  Line 8: Finally, the baby falls asleep in the arms of the mother. The mother stays awake and watches the baby breathe in the quiet room. Cody moves closer and puts his hand on the shoulder of the mother. He says, "Rest now. I will watch the baby." The mother closes her eyes and holds the baby close against her body.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/022_body_and_health_workout.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Nora cooled down with slow stretches on the mat. "That workout made my whole body feel awake," she said. The coordination she built today would carry into tomorrow's session. Each practice was a small step toward moving with more ease and control.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/020_body_and_health_posture.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Max understood why posture mattered so much. The coach smiled and said, "If your posture is good, then your coordination will follow." Max settled into his stance and got ready for the next drill.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/019_body_and_health_poop.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Luke understands that this daily routine helps him listen to his body's signals. He feels clean and happy because he took care of what his body needed. If he pays attention to the sensation next time, then he will know exactly when to go.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/018_body_and_health_pee.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Lily climbs back into her warm bed and curls up under the covers. She feels proud that she used the toilet all by herself. If she keeps practicing every night, she will be a big kid who never needs help. Lily closes her eyes and relaxes, ready to sleep.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/017_body_and_health_injury.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Jack feels brave again. "I will be more careful next time," he says. He knows that if he checks for moss, then he will not slip again. The bandage protects his knee as he walks inside.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/016_body_and_health_exhaustion.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Emma fell fast asleep before she could even finish counting her breaths. Her body relaxed on the soft mat as the warm afternoon light filled the room. She stayed asleep for a long time, and when she woke up, the shaky feeling had gone. Her energy had returned, and she felt ready to play again.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/004_animals_and_nature_ecosystem.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Jack saw the marsh become a healthy ecosystem. Ducks swam in the clean water, and frogs called from the reeds. The conservation group had brought the marsh back to life through steady effort. Jack learned that people working together could heal a place that was broken.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/008_animals_and_nature_orangutan.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Noah looks back once more and sees the furry orange family disappear into the leaves. The forest stays safe tonight because the conservation workers guard this place every day. Noah knows that his work matters because every observation helps protect the orangutan and its home.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/012_animals_and_nature_trail.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Toby picks up his empty bucket and starts back along the trail. The countryside feels quiet and peaceful in the warm sun. He is glad he checked the trough when he did.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/011_animals_and_nature_ivy.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Sophie stepped back to look at the ivy. It had grown higher than the old stones now. "You are a quiet green friend," she told the plant. She felt happy that she had watched its growth from the first tiny buds.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/009_animals_and_nature_scorpion.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Nora draws a picture of the scorpion in her notebook. She sketches the scorpion's tail and the rock where it waited. She is glad she watched quietly and saw the whole hunt.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/001_animals_and_nature_beak.md:
  Line 8: Finally, the bird waded deeper into the pond to find another fish. Cody understood that patience and a good beak helped the bird get food. He decided to come back tomorrow and watch again.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/006_animals_and_nature_fungus.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Luke understands how decay creates space for new life. He sees small green shoots growing near the crumbling log. If the fungus keeps breaking down the wood, then new plants will grow on the forest floor. The cycle of growth and decay continues under the shade of the trees.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_stories/tier_4/002_animals_and_nature_clover.md:
  Line 8: Finally, the bee lifts off and flies to another open clover. Ella smiles and walks on through the warm, buzzing field. If the bee visits enough flowers, then the pollen will reach many clover plants. The field will stay full of white blossoms season after season.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_stories_output/007_animals_and_nature_landscape.md:
  Line 8: Finally, the deer finishes drinking and turns away into the hills. Birds call from the branches above the trough. Max stays calm and shares the peaceful afternoon with the landscape around him.

/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/010_animals_and_nature_iris.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Owen stood up and looked at the whole plant. He knew the iris was strong because of all the things that helped it. The water from the soil and the pollen from the bees were both part of its growth. He smiled and walked away, knowing the garden would keep growing every day.


/home/aomukai/Ninereeds/tmp/triplet_t4_output/003_animals_and_nature_countryside.md:
  Line 8: Finally, Emma feels calm and peaceful in this place. "I could stay here all day," she tells her friend. The countryside feels like a safe and quiet home. Emma breathes deeply and feels glad she came to the trail.
